commands.review_summary:
The PR adds explicit requested provider IDs to capability-provider resolution and threads Voice Call streaming provider IDs through Talk transcription catalog and session resolution, with xAI, scoped-entry, and alias regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +394. Total +501 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and v2026.6.10 can resolve Talk transcription providers from only the active partial registry, and the PR body includes redacted before/after Gateway output for the xAI failure.
